```{r}
# Build camera effort from ALL images (any trigger) and save daily lookup
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)

# ---- Inputs ----
images_path <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data/images.csv"
tz_local    <- "America/Vancouver"

# ---- Load & select ----
tmp.dat <- read.csv(images_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  dplyr::select(station_id, orig_file, timestamp_pst, image_trigger, misfire) %>%
  dplyr::rename(
    Deployment.Location.ID = station_id,
    Image.ID               = orig_file,
    Date_Time.Captured     = timestamp_pst,
    Image_Trigger          = image_trigger,
    Blank                  = misfire
  )

# ---- Parse timestamps (ISO + numeric epoch 10s/13ms) ----
dt <- suppressWarnings(lubridate::ymd_hms(tmp.dat$Date_Time.Captured, tz = tz_local))
bad_str <- is.na(dt)

if (any(bad_str) && any(grepl("^[0-9]+$", tmp.dat$Date_Time.Captured[bad_str]))) {
  x <- tmp.dat$Date_Time.Captured[bad_str]
  dt_epoch <- ifelse(nchar(x) == 13,
                     as_datetime(as.numeric(x)/1000, tz = tz_local),
                     ifelse(nchar(x) == 10,
                            as_datetime(as.numeric(x), tz = tz_local), NA))
  dt[bad_str] <- dt_epoch
}

tmp.dat$Date_Time.Captured <- dt

# ---- Drop NAs, apply BLT38 +1 month shift, then keep date ----
tmp.dat <- tmp.dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(Date_Time.Captured)) %>%
  mutate(
    Date_Time.Captured = dplyr::case_when(
      Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT38" ~ Date_Time.Captured %m+% months(1),
      TRUE ~ Date_Time.Captured
    ),
    Date = as_date(Date_Time.Captured)
  )

# ---- Station-day coverage from ALL images ----
station_dates_all <- tmp.dat %>% distinct(Deployment.Location.ID, Date)

# ---- Collapse contiguous dates to ranges per station ----
collapse_to_ranges <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Date) %>%
    group_by(Deployment.Location.ID) %>%
    mutate(
      lag_date = lag(Date),
      new_grp  = if_else(is.na(lag_date) | (Date != lag_date + days(1)), 1L, 0L),
      grp_id   = cumsum(replace_na(new_grp, 1L))
    ) %>%
    group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, grp_id) %>%
    summarise(
      Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date = min(Date),
      Camera.Deployment.End.Date   = max(Date),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date)
}

eff <- collapse_to_ranges(station_dates_all)

# ---- Manual bridge for BLT13: collapse groups 1–38 into one continuous span ----
if (any(eff$Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT13")) {
  blt13_span <- eff %>%
    filter(Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT13") %>%
    summarise(
      Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date = min(Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date, na.rm = TRUE),
      Camera.Deployment.End.Date   = max(Camera.Deployment.End.Date,   na.rm = TRUE)
    )

  eff <- eff %>%
    filter(Deployment.Location.ID != "BLT13") %>%
    bind_rows(
      tibble(
        Deployment.Location.ID = "BLT13",
        grp_id = 1L,
        Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date = blt13_span$Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date,
        Camera.Deployment.End.Date   = blt13_span$Camera.Deployment.End.Date
      )
    ) %>%
    group_by(Deployment.Location.ID) %>%
    arrange(Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date, .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    mutate(grp_id = row_number()) %>%
    ungroup()
}

# ---- Daily lookup (inclusive) ----
row.lookup <- eff %>%
  mutate(Date = map2(Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date, Camera.Deployment.End.Date, ~ seq(.x, .y, by = "day"))) %>%
  select(Deployment.Location.ID, Date) %>%
  unnest(Date) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Date)

# ---- Save outputs ----
dir.create("~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

write.csv(eff,        "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data/eff.csv",                                       row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(eff,        "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data/eff_from_all_images.csv",                 row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(row.lookup, "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data/daily_effort_lookup_from_all_images.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(row.lookup, "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data/daily_effort_lookup.csv",                 row.names = FALSE)

cat("Effort ranges:", nrow(eff), " | Station-days:", nrow(row.lookup), "\n")

# ---- Visual check ----
ggplot(eff, aes(x = Camera.Deployment.Begin.Date, y = Deployment.Location.ID)) +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = Camera.Deployment.End.Date, yend = Deployment.Location.ID), linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month", date_labels = "%b %Y") +
  labs(x = "Month-Year", y = "Deployment.Location.ID", title = "Camera Effort (ALL images)") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```



```{r}
# Independent detections (assign events, then keep events on ACTIVE days)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(purrr); library(lubridate)
})

# Params & paths
detections_path   <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data/BLT_detection_data.csv"
eff_lookup_path   <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data/daily_effort_lookup.csv"
out_dir_processed <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data"
dir.create(out_dir_processed, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Independence window (minutes)
independent <- 30

# Local tz for ACTIVE-day filtering
tz_local <- "America/Vancouver"

# Load data
dat        <- read.csv(detections_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
row.lookup <- read.csv(eff_lookup_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Parse detection timestamps
dat$Date_Time.Captured <- suppressWarnings(ymd_hms(dat$Date_Time.Captured, truncated = 2))
dat <- dat %>% filter(!is.na(Date_Time.Captured))

# Animals only
dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Blank == FALSE, !is.na(Species)) %>%
  mutate(Deployment.Location.ID = as.character(Deployment.Location.ID),
         Species = as.character(Species)) %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, Date_Time.Captured)

# If Minimum.Group.Size missing, use Number.of.Animals
if (!"Minimum.Group.Size" %in% names(dat)) {
  dat$Minimum.Group.Size <- dat$Number.of.Animals
}

# Assign Event.IDs per (station × species)
assign_events <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df %>% mutate(Event.ID = character(0)))
  df <- df %>% arrange(Date_Time.Captured) %>%
    mutate(gap_sec = as.numeric(Date_Time.Captured - lag(Date_Time.Captured), units = "secs"))
  seq_cnt <- 0L
  ev <- character(nrow(df))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    if (i == 1L) {
      ev[i] <- paste0("E", seq_cnt)
    } else {
      if (is.na(df$gap_sec[i]) || df$gap_sec[i] > independent * 60) seq_cnt <- seq_cnt + 1L
      ev[i] <- paste0("E", seq_cnt)
    }
  }
  df$Event.ID <- ev
  df
}

dat <- dat %>%
  group_nest(Deployment.Location.ID, Species) %>%
  mutate(data = map(data, assign_events)) %>%
  unnest(data) %>%
  mutate(Event.ID = paste(Event.ID, Deployment.Location.ID, Species, sep = "_"))

# Event summaries
event_start <- dat %>% group_by(Event.ID) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = Date_Time.Captured, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% select(Event.ID, Date_Time_start = Date_Time.Captured)

event_end <- dat %>% group_by(Event.ID) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = Date_Time.Captured, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% select(Event.ID, Date_Time_end = Date_Time.Captured)

event_n <- dat %>% group_by(Event.ID) %>%
  summarise(Event.Observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

event_summary <- event_start %>%
  left_join(event_end, by = "Event.ID") %>%
  mutate(Event.Duration = as.numeric(int_length(Date_Time_start %--% Date_Time_end))) %>%
  left_join(event_n, by = "Event.ID") %>%
  distinct(Event.ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

dat <- dat %>% left_join(event_summary, by = "Event.ID")

# One row per event
ind.dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, Date_Time.Captured) %>%
  filter(!duplicated(Event.ID))

# Filter to ACTIVE days (local calendar date)
ind.dat <- ind.dat %>%
  mutate(date_local = as.Date(with_tz(Date_Time.Captured, tz_local)))

row.lookup <- row.lookup %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

ind.dat <- ind.dat %>%
  semi_join(row.lookup, by = c("Deployment.Location.ID", "date_local" = "Date")) %>%
  select(-date_local)

# Save
proj_id <- if ("Project.ID" %in% names(dat)) dat$Project.ID[1] else "BLT"
write.csv(ind.dat,
          file.path(out_dir_processed, paste0(proj_id, "_", independent, "min_Independent.csv")),
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("Independent events saved: ", nrow(ind.dat), "\n", sep = "")


# Raw detections per species (one row per original detection)
raw_by_species <- dat %>%
  dplyr::count(Species, name = "Raw.Detections")

# Independent events per species (one row per event)
ind_by_species <- ind.dat %>%
  dplyr::count(Species, name = "Independent.Events")

# Combine, fill missing with zeros, sort
species_counts <- dplyr::full_join(raw_by_species, ind_by_species, by = "Species") %>%
  tidyr::replace_na(list(Raw.Detections = 0L, Independent.Events = 0L)) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(Raw.Detections))

# Save and print
dir.create("~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
write.csv(species_counts,
          "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data/species_raw_vs_independent_counts.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

species_counts

```



``` {r}
# Independent detections (events) filtered to ACTIVE days, plus species counts
suppressPackageStartupMessages({ library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(purrr); library(lubridate) })

# ---- Params & paths ----
detections_path   <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data/BLT_detection_data.csv"
eff_lookup_path   <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data/daily_effort_lookup.csv"
out_dir_processed <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/processed_data"
dir.create(out_dir_processed, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

independent <- 30            # minutes
tz_local    <- "America/Vancouver"

# ---- Load data ----
dat        <- read.csv(detections_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
row.lookup <- read.csv(eff_lookup_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>% mutate(Date = as.Date(Date))

# ---- Robust timestamp parse (ISO + epoch 10s/13ms) ----
dt_det <- suppressWarnings(ymd_hms(dat$Date_Time.Captured, truncated = 2))
bad_det <- is.na(dt_det) & grepl("^[0-9]+$", dat$Date_Time.Captured)

if (any(bad_det)) {
  x <- dat$Date_Time.Captured[bad_det]
  dt_epoch <- ifelse(nchar(x) == 13,
                     as_datetime(as.numeric(x)/1000),
                     ifelse(nchar(x) == 10,
                            as_datetime(as.numeric(x)), NA))
  dt_det[bad_det] <- dt_epoch
}

dat$Date_Time.Captured <- dt_det

# ---- Drop NAs, apply shifts: BLT38 +1 month; BLT29 +12 hours (detections only) ----
dat <- dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(Date_Time.Captured)) %>%
  mutate(
    Date_Time.Captured = dplyr::case_when(
      Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT38" ~ Date_Time.Captured %m+% months(1),
      Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT29" ~ Date_Time.Captured + hours(12),
      TRUE ~ Date_Time.Captured
    )
  )

# ---- Animals only, order ----
dat <- dat %>%
  filter(Blank == FALSE, !is.na(Species)) %>%
  mutate(
    Deployment.Location.ID = as.character(Deployment.Location.ID),
    Species = as.character(Species)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, Date_Time.Captured)

# ---- Raw species counts (before event collapsing) ----
species_counts_raw <- dat %>%
  count(Species, name = "Raw.Detections") %>%
  arrange(desc(Raw.Detections))

# ---- Independence-based events (per station × species) ----
if (!"Minimum.Group.Size" %in% names(dat)) {
  dat$Minimum.Group.Size <- dat$Number.of.Animals
}

assign_events <- function(df) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(df %>% mutate(Event.ID = character(0)))
  df <- df %>% arrange(Date_Time.Captured) %>%
    mutate(gap_sec = as.numeric(Date_Time.Captured - lag(Date_Time.Captured), units = "secs"))
  seq_cnt <- 0L
  ev <- character(nrow(df))
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
    if (i == 1L) {
      ev[i] <- paste0("E", seq_cnt)
    } else {
      if (is.na(df$gap_sec[i]) || df$gap_sec[i] > independent * 60) seq_cnt <- seq_cnt + 1L
      ev[i] <- paste0("E", seq_cnt)
    }
  }
  df$Event.ID <- ev
  df
}

dat <- dat %>%
  group_nest(Deployment.Location.ID, Species) %>%
  mutate(data = map(data, assign_events)) %>%
  unnest(data) %>%
  mutate(Event.ID = paste(Event.ID, Deployment.Location.ID, Species, sep = "_"))

# ---- Event summaries (optional fields) ----
event_start <- dat %>% group_by(Event.ID) %>%
  slice_min(order_by = Date_Time.Captured, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% select(Event.ID, Date_Time_start = Date_Time.Captured)

event_end <- dat %>% group_by(Event.ID) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = Date_Time.Captured, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% select(Event.ID, Date_Time_end = Date_Time.Captured)

event_n <- dat %>% group_by(Event.ID) %>%
  summarise(Event.Observations = n(), .groups = "drop")

event_summary <- event_start %>%
  left_join(event_end, by = "Event.ID") %>%
  mutate(Event.Duration = as.numeric(int_length(Date_Time_start %--% Date_Time_end))) %>%
  left_join(event_n, by = "Event.ID") %>%
  distinct(Event.ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

dat <- dat %>% left_join(event_summary, by = "Event.ID")

# ---- One row per event (first image) ----
ind.dat <- dat %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, Date_Time.Captured) %>%
  filter(!duplicated(Event.ID))

# ---- Keep only events on ACTIVE days (local calendar) ----
ind.dat <- ind.dat %>%
  mutate(date_local = as.Date(with_tz(Date_Time.Captured, tz_local))) %>%
  semi_join(row.lookup, by = c("Deployment.Location.ID", "date_local" = "Date")) %>%
  select(-date_local)

# ---- Independent species counts ----
species_counts_ind <- ind.dat %>%
  count(Species, name = paste0("Independent.", independent, "min")) %>%
  arrange(desc(!!sym(paste0("Independent.", independent, "min"))))

# ---- Save outputs ----
proj_id <- if ("Project.ID" %in% names(dat)) dat$Project.ID[1] else "BLT"

write.csv(ind.dat,
          file.path(out_dir_processed, paste0(proj_id, "_", independent, "min_Independent.csv")),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(species_counts_raw,
          file.path(out_dir_processed, paste0(proj_id, "_Species_Raw_Counts.csv")),
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(species_counts_ind,
          file.path(out_dir_processed, paste0(proj_id, "_Species_Independent_", independent, "min_Counts.csv")),
          row.names = FALSE)

# ---- Print the two lists in the document ----
cat("\nRaw detections by species:\n")
print(species_counts_raw)

cat("\nIndependent detections by species (", independent, " min):\n", sep = "")
print(species_counts_ind)

cat("\nIndependent events saved: ", nrow(ind.dat), "\n", sep = "")
```
```{r bears_independence_histogram_upto45, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(purrr); library(lubridate); library(ggplot2)
})

species_of_interest <- c("Ursus arctos", "Ursus americanus")
burst_sec <- 60   # treat photos within 60s as the same "burst/encounter"
cap_min   <- 45   # only show gaps up to 45 minutes

# Reuse detections if already loaded; else load & minimally prep with shifts
if (!exists("dat")) {
  detections_path <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data/BLT_detection_data.csv"
  dat <- read.csv(detections_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # robust timestamp parse (ISO + epoch 10s/13ms)
  dt_det  <- suppressWarnings(ymd_hms(dat$Date_Time.Captured, truncated = 2))
  bad_det <- is.na(dt_det) & grepl("^[0-9]+$", dat$Date_Time.Captured)
  if (any(bad_det)) {
    x <- dat$Date_Time.Captured[bad_det]
    dt_epoch <- ifelse(nchar(x) == 13, as_datetime(as.numeric(x)/1000),
                       ifelse(nchar(x) == 10, as_datetime(as.numeric(x)), NA))
    dt_det[bad_det] <- dt_epoch
  }
  dat$Date_Time.Captured <- dt_det

  dat <- dat %>%
    filter(!is.na(Date_Time.Captured), Blank == FALSE, !is.na(Species)) %>%
    mutate(
      Date_Time.Captured = case_when(
        Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT38" ~ Date_Time.Captured %m+% months(1),
        Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT39" ~ Date_Time.Captured + hours(12),
        TRUE ~ Date_Time.Captured
      )
    )
}

# Collapse bursts per station × species, then compute inter-burst gaps
bears_bursts <- dat %>%
  filter(Species %in% c("Ursus arctos", "Ursus americanus")) %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, Date_Time.Captured) %>%
  group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, Species) %>%
  mutate(
    gap_sec_raw = as.numeric(difftime(Date_Time.Captured, lag(Date_Time.Captured), units = "secs")),
    new_burst   = if_else(is.na(gap_sec_raw) | gap_sec_raw > burst_sec, 1L, 0L),
    burst_id    = cumsum(replace_na(new_burst, 1L))
  ) %>%
  group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, burst_id) %>%
  summarise(burst_time = min(Date_Time.Captured), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, burst_time) %>%
  group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, Species) %>%
  mutate(gap_min = as.numeric(difftime(burst_time, lag(burst_time), units = "mins"))) %>%
  ungroup()

# Keep gaps within 0..45 minutes for plotting
bears_plot <- bears_bursts %>%
  filter(!is.na(gap_min), gap_min >= 0, gap_min <= cap_min)

ggplot(bears_plot, aes(x = gap_min)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 3, boundary = 0, closed = "left") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(15, 30, 45), linetype = 2) +
  facet_wrap(~ Species, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, cap_min, by = 5)) +
  labs(
    title = paste0("Inter-burst gaps for bears (≤ ", cap_min, " min)"),
    subtitle = paste0("Bursts collapsed at ≤ ", burst_sec, " seconds"),
    x = "Gap between consecutive bursts (minutes)",
    y = "Count",
    caption = "Dashed lines at 15, 30, and 45 minutes."
  ) +
  theme_minimal()


```


```{r bears_threshold_ecdf_and_elbow, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(tidyr); library(purrr); library(lubridate); library(ggplot2)
})

species_of_interest <- c("Ursus arctos", "Ursus americanus")
burst_sec <- 60
t_grid    <- 1:45

# --- Load detections if not already in memory as `dat` ---
if (!exists("dat")) {
  detections_path <- "~/Desktop/2025-BLT/raw_data/BLT_detection_data.csv"
  dat <- read.csv(detections_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

  # robust timestamp parse (ISO + epoch 10s/13ms)
  dt  <- suppressWarnings(ymd_hms(dat$Date_Time.Captured, truncated = 2))
  bad <- is.na(dt) & grepl("^[0-9]+$", dat$Date_Time.Captured)
  if (any(bad)) {
    x <- dat$Date_Time.Captured[bad]
    dt_epoch <- ifelse(nchar(x) == 13, as_datetime(as.numeric(x)/1000),
                       ifelse(nchar(x) == 10, as_datetime(as.numeric(x)), NA))
    dt[bad] <- dt_epoch
  }
  dat$Date_Time.Captured <- dt

  # animals only + site-specific shifts
  dat <- dat %>%
    filter(!is.na(Date_Time.Captured), Blank == FALSE, !is.na(Species)) %>%
    mutate(
      Date_Time.Captured = case_when(
        Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT38" ~ Date_Time.Captured %m+% months(1),
        Deployment.Location.ID == "BLT39" ~ Date_Time.Captured + hours(12),
        TRUE ~ Date_Time.Captured
      )
    )
}

# --- Collapse photos into bursts (≤60s) per station × species; then inter-burst gaps (mins) ---
bears_bursts <- dat %>%
  filter(Species %in% species_of_interest) %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, Date_Time.Captured) %>%
  group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, Species) %>%
  mutate(
    gap_sec_raw = as.numeric(difftime(Date_Time.Captured, lag(Date_Time.Captured), units = "secs")),
    new_burst   = if_else(is.na(gap_sec_raw) | gap_sec_raw > burst_sec, 1L, 0L),
    burst_id    = cumsum(replace_na(new_burst, 1L))
  ) %>%
  group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, burst_id) %>%
  summarise(burst_time = min(Date_Time.Captured), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(Deployment.Location.ID, Species, burst_time) %>%
  group_by(Deployment.Location.ID, Species) %>%
  mutate(gap_min = as.numeric(difftime(burst_time, lag(burst_time), units = "mins"))) %>%
  ungroup()

# --- Helper: elbow (knee) via max perpendicular distance to the line from min(t) to max(t) ---
elbow_pick <- function(x, y) {
  x0 <- min(x); y0 <- y[which.min(x)]
  x1 <- max(x); y1 <- y[which.max(x)]
  num <- abs((y1 - y0) * x - (x1 - x0) * y + x1*y0 - y1*x0)
  den <- sqrt((y1 - y0)^2 + (x1 - x0)^2)
  x[which.max(num / ifelse(den == 0, 1, den))]
}

# --- Build events-vs-threshold using burst counts minus merges (gaps <= t) ---
ev_curve <- bears_bursts %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(
    total_bursts = n(),                      # across all stations
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  right_join(
    bears_bursts %>%
      filter(!is.na(gap_min)) %>%
      mutate(t_needed = ceiling(pmax(gap_min, 0))) %>%   # minute at which a gap merges
      filter(t_needed <= max(t_grid)) %>%
      count(Species, t_needed, name = "merges_at_t"),
    by = "Species"
  ) %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  complete(t_needed = t_grid, fill = list(merges_at_t = 0)) %>%
  arrange(Species, t_needed) %>%
  mutate(
    cum_merges = cumsum(merges_at_t),
    events     = total_bursts - cum_merges
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  rename(threshold_min = t_needed)

# elbow per species
elbows <- ev_curve %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(best_threshold = elbow_pick(threshold_min, events), .groups = "drop")

# --- PLOT 1: ECDF of inter-burst gaps (0–45 min) for visual cutoff sense ---
ecdf_df <- bears_bursts %>%
  filter(!is.na(gap_min), gap_min >= 0, gap_min <= max(t_grid)) %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  arrange(gap_min) %>%
  mutate(p = row_number() / n()) %>%
  ungroup()

p1 <- ggplot(ecdf_df, aes(x = gap_min, y = p, color = Species)) +
  geom_step() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(15, 30, 45), linetype = 2) +
  geom_vline(data = elbows, aes(xintercept = best_threshold, color = Species), linetype = "solid") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, max(t_grid)), breaks = seq(0, max(t_grid), by = 5)) +
  labs(
    title = "ECDF of inter-burst gaps (bears)",
    subtitle = "Solid colored line = elbow pick; dashed = 15/30/45 min reference",
    x = "Gap (minutes)", y = "Empirical CDF"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# --- PLOT 2: Events vs threshold with elbow marked (choose the 'knee') ---
p2 <- ggplot(ev_curve, aes(x = threshold_min, y = events, color = Species)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(15, 30, 45), linetype = 2) +
  geom_vline(data = elbows, aes(xintercept = best_threshold, color = Species), linetype = "solid") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(t_grid), by = 5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Independent event count vs threshold (1–45 min)",
    subtitle = "Solid colored line = elbow pick; dashed = 15/30/45 min",
    x = "Threshold (minutes)", y = "Total independent events"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(p1)
print(p2)

# Show suggested thresholds in console
print(elbows)

```

```{r}


# 1) Use ind.dat as-is; exclude ONLY the two species
ind30_exact <- ind.dat %>%
  filter(!Species %in% c("Homo sapiens", "Canis familiaris"))

# 2) Totals per species (ascending for plotting) — identical structure to your raw plot
det.sum.total <- ind30_exact %>%
  filter(!is.na(Species), Species != "") %>%
  count(Species, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(n)

# 3) Locations per species (from the SAME filtered data)
#    (This mirrors your loop that computed unique Deployment.Location.ID counts)
locs_per_species <- ind30_exact %>%
  group_by(Species) %>%
  summarise(Locations = n_distinct(Deployment.Location.ID), .groups = "drop")

det.sum.total <- det.sum.total %>%
  left_join(locs_per_species, by = "Species")

# 4) Total number of stations: use the stations present in ind.dat (no effort join that could drop things)
n.stat <- n_distinct(ind.dat$Deployment.Location.ID)

# 5) Plot: totals (left) + proportion of sites (right)
if (nrow(det.sum.total) == 0) {
  layout(matrix(1,1,1)); plot.new(); title("No detections to plot (30-min, excluding humans & dogs)")
} else {
  layout(matrix(c(1,1,2), 1, 3, byrow = TRUE))

  par(mar = c(5,16,1,1))
  barplot(
    det.sum.total$n,
    names.arg = paste0(det.sum.total$Species, " (n = ", det.sum.total$n, ")"),
    las = 1, cex.names = 1,
    xlab = "Total independent detections (30 min)",
    horiz = TRUE
  )

  par(mar = c(5,1,1,1))
  barplot(
    det.sum.total$Locations / n.stat,
    las = 1, cex.names = 0.7,
    xlab = "Proportion of stations detected",
    horiz = TRUE, xlim = c(0, 1)
  )
  abline(v = 1, lty = 2)
}


```

```{r}
# --- 1) Use ind.dat as-is; exclude ONLY the two species ---
ind30_exact <- ind.dat %>%
  dplyr::filter(!Species %in% c("Homo sapiens", "Canis familiaris"))

# --- 2) Clean and correct common names ---
ind30_exact <- ind30_exact %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species.Common.Name = sub(",.*$", "", Species.Common.Name),
    Species.Common.Name = trimws(Species.Common.Name)
  ) %>%
  # Apply preferred naming rules
  dplyr::mutate(
    Species.Common.Name = dplyr::case_when(
      # prefer Southern Red-backed Vole
      grepl("^Revillagigedo Island Red[- ]backed Vole$", Species.Common.Name, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Southern Red-backed Vole",

      # Puma → Cougar
      grepl("^Puma", Species.Common.Name, ignore.case = TRUE) | grepl("^Puma\\s+concolor$", Species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Cougar",

      # Brown Bear → Grizzly Bear
      grepl("^Brown Bear", Species.Common.Name, ignore.case = TRUE) | grepl("^Ursus\\s+arctos$", Species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Grizzly Bear",

      # Wapiti → Elk
      grepl("^Wapiti", Species.Common.Name, ignore.case = TRUE) | grepl("^Cervus\\s+canadensis$", Species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Elk",
      
        # Carolina → Northern
      grepl("^Carolina Flying Squirrel", Species.Common.Name, ignore.case = TRUE) | grepl("^Glaucous\\s+sabrinus$", Species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Northern Flying Squirrel",

      # Birds and unknowns
      (is.na(Species.Common.Name) | Species.Common.Name == "") & grepl("bird", Species, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "Bird spp.",
      (is.na(Species.Common.Name) | Species.Common.Name == "") ~ "Unknown species",

      TRUE ~ Species.Common.Name
    )
  )

# --- 3) Totals per species (ascending for plotting) ---
det.sum.total <- ind30_exact %>%
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(Species), Species != "") %>%
  dplyr::count(Species, Species.Common.Name, name = "n") %>%
  dplyr::arrange(n)

# --- 4) Locations per species ---
locs_per_species <- ind30_exact %>%
  dplyr::group_by(Species, Species.Common.Name) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(Locations = dplyr::n_distinct(Deployment.Location.ID), .groups = "drop")

det.sum.total <- det.sum.total %>%
  dplyr::left_join(locs_per_species, by = c("Species", "Species.Common.Name"))

# --- 5) Total number of stations ---
n.stat <- dplyr::n_distinct(ind.dat$Deployment.Location.ID)

# --- 6) Plot ---
if (nrow(det.sum.total) == 0) {
  layout(matrix(1,1,1))
  plot.new(); title("No detections to plot (30-min, excluding humans & dogs)")
} else {
  layout(matrix(c(1,1,2), 1, 3, byrow = TRUE))

  par(mar = c(5,16,1,1))
  barplot(
    det.sum.total$n,
    names.arg = paste0(det.sum.total$Species.Common.Name, " (n = ", det.sum.total$n, ")"),
    las = 1, cex.names = 1,
    xlab = "Total independent detections (30 min)",
    horiz = TRUE
  )

  par(mar = c(5,1,1,1))
  barplot(
    det.sum.total$Locations / n.stat,
    las = 1, cex.names = 0.7,
    xlab = "Proportion of stations detected",
    horiz = TRUE, xlim = c(0, 1)
  )
  abline(v = 1, lty = 2)
}



```
